history.content:
<thought>
I am at the top-left interior cell facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The safer path begins by going downward along the left side, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the upper-left interior, facing down. Moving straight would eventually hit lava in this column, but the bottom row corridor to the right is safe and leads toward the goal. First I should continue downward into the safe corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell directly below me is open floor. Moving forward will take me into the open corridor toward the lower area, which is a safe path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down with open floor directly ahead. The goal is far to the lower-right, and moving forward lets me continue down the left corridor toward the open bottom passage.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at the left side. The cell directly in front of me is open floor, and moving downward along this column is the safe path toward the bottom corridor that leads right to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am near the lower-left area facing down, with a wall directly below me, so moving forward is blocked. To make progress toward the goal on the lower-right side, I should turn to face right and move along the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side of the open corridor, facing right. The row ahead is clear all the way across, and the goal is down near the far right. The best next step is to advance east along this safe path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right on an open corridor. The cells ahead to the right are clear, while going down soon leads to lava. The goal is farther to the lower-right, so the best immediate move is to continue right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right on an open row. Moving forward advances me toward the only open path around the lava barrier, and the next cell to the right is safe.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, facing right. Moving forward would stay on safe floor cells, while the goal is down and to the right beyond a lava barrier. The immediate best move is to continue right toward the open right side corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6 facing right. Moving forward along this row is safe, and the goal is down-right of my position. Advancing right gets me closer while avoiding the lava barrier below for now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, facing right, with open floor ahead until the wall near the right side. The goal is down and slightly right from me, and the safe route is to move right along this corridor first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right end of the open corridor on row 6, facing right toward a wall. The goal is down and slightly right from me, but I cannot move forward. I should turn right to face downward so I can move toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the bottom-right, facing down. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is one row below and one column to the right, so I should first turn to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right at the end of the corridor. The goal is below and to the right, but moving forward would hit a wall. I should turn right to face downward so I can move toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 8 facing down. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The goal is below and to the left, so I should first turn to face left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right side of the corridor facing left. The goal is down and slightly right, but directly below me is lava, so I should move left along the safe row to find a path downward later.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, facing left, with open floor to my left. The goal is down and to the right, but there is a solid lava barrier across row 7 except at the far-right column, so I need to first move left along the current row to reach that safe passage.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6 facing left. The cell directly left is empty, but moving left would lead toward a blocked lava column and away from the safer open route to the goal. The best next step is to turn around toward the right so I can head east along the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 6 facing down. The cell directly below me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The goal is down-right from my position, and there is open space to my right, so I should turn to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right on an open row. The goal is down and to the right, and moving forward would bring me closer to the open passage near the right edge without hitting lava or a wall.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6 facing right. The cell directly ahead is empty, and continuing right moves me toward the opening on the right side that leads down to the goal row. So the best next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am near the bottom-right area, facing right. Directly in front of me is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The goal is below and to the right, so I should turn to face downward toward it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right side of the open corridor, facing down. The cell directly ahead is a wall-border area blocked by lava below, while the goal is down and to the left on the bottom-right interior row. I should first turn right to face left toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right side of the open corridor, facing left. The goal is down and to my right, but there is a wall of lava across row 7 except at the far right opening. The safest path is to turn around, move right to the corridor edge, then go down toward the goal. First I should face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>
